title: Helicobacter pylori ulcers
script_summary: Exploring the surprising role of Helicobacter pylori in stomach ulcers.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about Helicobacter pylori ulcers.
Most believe ulcers are caused by stress or spicy foods, but surprise! It's often a bacterial infection.
Helicobacter pylori, a sneaky bacterium, can live in your stomach lining, causing inflammation.
Research shows that up to 80% of gastric ulcers are linked to this bacterium. How wild is that?
Antibiotics can eliminate it, but not everyone with H. pylori has ulcers. It's a complex dance of factors.
Curious about more science secrets? Like and follow for your next mind-bending fact!
